## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** KITTI 00, KITTI 05, KITTI 08, small campus VLP-16 sequence, large campus VLP-16 sequence — `source_fact`; manual, p. 4–6, § V-A. Dataset;V-C. Performance Comparison, Fig. 7-10
- **input_unit:** single raw LiDAR keyframe point cloud — `source_fact`; manual, p. 1–4, § Abstract;III. LiDAR Iris;IV. Loop-Closure Detection, Fig. 2-3
- **invariances:** yaw rotation — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 1–3, § Abstract;III-B. Fourier Transform for a Translation-Invariant LiDAR Iris, Fig. 2;Fig. 5;Eq. 1-2
- **representation:** 80x360 polar LiDAR-Iris image, 8-bit height-occupancy encoding per bin, Fourier phase-correlation alignment, four 1D LoG-Gabor filters, thresholded binary feature map, Hamming-distance matching — `source_fact`; manual, p. 1–4, § III-A. Generation of LiDAR-Iris;III-B. Fourier Transform;III-C. Binary Feature Extraction;IV. Loop-Closure Detection, Fig. 2-6;Eq. 1-3
- **uses_learning:** no — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–3, § III-A. Generation of LiDAR-Iris Image Representation
- **uses_sequence:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 4, § IV. Loop-Closure Detection with LiDAR Iris
